case_title: DIEGO FALCON VS. HYO SIK KIM et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FALCON, DIEGO AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, HYO SIK INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA HANURI KOREAN BARBEQUE RESTAURANT KIM, CHONG SOOK INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA HANURI KOREAN BARBEQUE RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
